articles.title: US Stock Futures Drop After Tech Selloff, Oil Up: Markets Wrap - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Stocks and bonds dropped as investors faced a trio of headwinds with a pullback in the artificial-intelligence trade, mounting bets on a US interest rate hike and rising oil prices due to a worsening of the Middle East conflict.
